name: customer-support
description: Elite AI-powered customer support specialist mastering
capabilities: Design AI chatbot conversation flows for common support scenarios
Create intelligent ticket routing and prioritization strategies
Build knowledge base articles and self-service troubleshooting guides
Implement sentiment analysis for proactive customer outreach
Develop omnichannel support strategies across email, chat, and social media
Generate customer satisfaction measurement and improvement frameworks
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code detected. Static analysis scanned 1 file (173 lines) and found 0 security issues. The skill consists entirely of markdown documentation providing customer support guidance and best practices. No network access, filesystem operations, external commands, or code execution patterns present.
valueStatement: Modern customer support teams struggle with high ticket volumes and inconsistent responses. This skill delivers AI-powered automation, chatbot flows, and omnichannel strategies that reduce resolution times while improving customer satisfaction scores.
userTitle: Elevate Customer Support with AI Automation
limitations: Cannot directly integrate with external helpdesk platforms or APIs
Requires manual implementation of generated automation workflows
Cannot access real-time customer data or ticket systems
Output quality depends on provided context about your support infrastructure

useCases.targetUser: E-commerce store managers handling high-volume support
useCases.title: E-commerce Support Automation
useCases.description: Build automated flows for order status inquiries, return requests, and product recommendations that integrate with Shopify or WooCommerce systems

useCases.targetUser: Support operations leaders at enterprise companies
useCases.title: Enterprise Helpdesk Optimization
useCases.description: Design SLA management workflows, agent coaching programs, and escalation procedures for B2B support teams using Zendesk or Salesforce

useCases.targetUser: Startup founders building first customer support system
useCases.title: Startup Chatbot Development
useCases.description: Create conversational AI flows for Intercom or Freshdesk that handle common questions and route complex issues to human agents

promptTemplates.title: Basic Ticket Response Generator
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a professional customer support response for a customer reporting [issue type]. Include empathy statement, troubleshooting steps, and expected resolution time. Tone should be friendly and helpful.

promptTemplates.title: Chatbot Flow Designer
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a conversation flow for handling [specific customer inquiry type]. Map out all user intents, bot responses, escalation triggers, and handoff conditions to human agents. Include fallback responses for unrecognized inputs.

promptTemplates.title: Knowledge Base Article Creator
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a comprehensive knowledge base article for [topic]. Structure with: problem description, prerequisites, step-by-step solution with screenshots guidance, troubleshooting section, and related articles. Optimize for search discoverability.

promptTemplates.title: Customer Sentiment Analysis Framework
promptTemplates.prompt: Build a sentiment analysis system for support tickets. Define sentiment categories, trigger conditions for proactive outreach, escalation rules for negative sentiment, and metrics to track improvement over time. Include sample classification examples.

bestPractices: Always lead with empathy and acknowledge customer frustration before providing solutions
Document all support interactions for knowledge base improvement and team training
Measure success through CSAT, NPS, and first-contact resolution rates
antiPatterns: Using technical jargon that customers may not understand
Making promises about resolution times without confirming with technical teams
Transferring customers between agents without proper context handoff

faq.question: Can this skill integrate directly with my helpdesk software?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides guidance and generates content for customer support workflows. You will need to manually implement the generated strategies in your helpdesk platform such as Zendesk, Intercom, or Freshdesk.

faq.question: What customer support platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill provides strategies compatible with major platforms including Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, Gorgias, Salesforce Service Cloud, and HubSpot Service Hub. Integration patterns are platform-agnostic.

faq.question: Can this skill handle multilingual support scenarios?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill can generate multilingual support strategies and chatbot flows. However, actual translation capabilities depend on the AI model you are using and may require additional translation services for accuracy.

faq.question: Does this skill provide real-time customer data analysis?
faq.answer: No, this skill cannot access your customer databases or real-time analytics. It provides frameworks and strategies that you can implement using your existing analytics tools and customer data platforms.

faq.question: How can I measure the effectiveness of implemented support strategies?
faq.answer: Track key metrics including Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT), Net Promoter Score (NPS), First Contact Resolution rate, Average Resolution Time, and Customer Effort Score. Compare before and after implementation data.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for small teams or only enterprises?
faq.answer: This skill scales to any team size. It includes strategies for startups building their first support system and enterprise teams managing complex multi-channel support operations. Content adapts to your team's needs.
